Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmChiTietDonHang, frmDanhSachVatTuDonHang
Nút WinForms gốc: (không)
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETALL, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETLISTBYORDER, TR_ORDER_GETBYID, TR_TONGHOP_CHITIET_DONHANG2
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_color, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_loaisp, tr_order, tr_order_detail
